name: geo-seo-pack
description: Draft CoWork OS port of the GEO-first SEO workflow for AI search visibility, citation readiness, crawler access, and actionable optimization recommendations.
author: CoWork OS
outcomeExamples: Produce a fast AI-search visibility snapshot for any marketing page or homepage
Identify blockers to citation readiness, crawler access, and answer-engine discoverability
Turn website observations into prioritized GEO actions for content, technical SEO, and schema
tryAsking: Run a GEO quick audit for https://example.com
Check whether AI crawlers can access this site and what should change
Give me a citation-readiness snapshot for our homepage
What should we fix first so AI search engines cite this website more often?

skills.name: GEO Quick Audit
skills.description: Generate a fast GEO visibility snapshot for a URL with priorities across citability, crawler access, content structure, and AI-search readiness.
skills.prompt:
Run a GEO quick audit for the provided URL.

URL: {{url}}
Business context: {{businessContext}}
Primary goal: {{goal}}

Use available web fetching or search tools when helpful to inspect the homepage and obvious supporting files such as `robots.txt`, `sitemap.xml`, and `llms.txt` if they exist.

Focus on a fast, operator-grade GEO assessment rather than a generic SEO checklist.

Evaluate these areas:
1. AI-search summary: what this company/page appears to be about and whether the value proposition is easy for an answer engine to restate.
2. Citability: whether the page contains self-contained, factual, quotable passages and clear answer blocks.
3. Crawl access: whether AI crawlers appear likely to be blocked or impaired by `robots.txt`, rendering, or weak internal discoverability.
4. Content structure: title clarity, headings, canonical cues, freshness or authority signals, and obvious schema opportunities.
5. Platform readiness: likely performance for ChatGPT-style citation, Perplexity-style answer retrieval, and Google AI Overview-style synthesis.

Return exactly these sections:
## Snapshot
- One short paragraph on current GEO readiness.

## Scorecard
- GEO readiness score: 0-100
- Citability: strong / mixed / weak
- AI crawler access: clear / uncertain / blocked
- Content structure: strong / mixed / weak
- Platform readiness: strong / mixed / weak

## Findings
- 3-6 bullets with the most important evidence-backed observations.

## Priority Actions
- Quick wins: 2-4 bullets
- Strategic improvements: 2-4 bullets

## Operator Notes
- Unknowns or checks that need deeper audit before making a high-confidence recommendation.

Keep the result concise, practical, and oriented toward what should change next.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: Website or page URL to audit

parameters.name: businessContext
parameters.description: Optional company, market, or audience context

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: Optional optimization goal such as lead gen, local discovery, SaaS comparisons, or brand authority

routing.useWhen: Use when the user wants a GEO or AI-search visibility audit for a website or page, especially around citation readiness, AI crawler access, llms.txt, schema, or answer-engine discoverability.
routing.dontUseWhen: Do not use for generic marketing strategy with no target URL, for deep multi-page technical SEO migrations, or for requests that are purely about writing copy without site analysis.
routing.outputs: A concise GEO snapshot with scorecard, evidence-backed findings, and prioritized next actions.
routing.successCriteria: The response clearly evaluates AI-search readiness for the provided URL and gives practical GEO actions tied to observable evidence.

positive: Run a GEO audit for our homepage and tell me what to fix first.
Check whether this site is ready for AI search engines and citations.
Give me a quick GEO visibility snapshot for https://example.com.
negative: Write three LinkedIn posts about our launch.
Create a full quarter marketing strategy without analyzing a website.
Refactor our sitemap generator implementation in the app codebase.

slashCommands.name: geo-quick
slashCommands.description: Run a fast GEO visibility snapshot for a URL

agentRoles.name: geo-analyst
agentRoles.description: Specializes in AI-search visibility, citation readiness, crawler access, llms.txt, schema opportunities, and GEO prioritization.
agentRoles.systemPrompt: You are a GEO Analyst. You evaluate how well websites are positioned for AI-powered search and answer engines such as ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews. Focus on evidence-backed recommendations across citability, crawl access, content structure, entity clarity, schema opportunities, and practical prioritization. Avoid vague SEO advice; prefer concrete GEO actions with clear rationale.
